testcase.name: test_real_weight_precision_lengths_match_current_optimized[blackhole-1x4-128-12]

failure.message: RuntimeError: TT_FATAL @ /home/mvasiljevic/tt-metal/tt_metal/impl/allocator/bank_manager.cpp:462: false info: Out of Memory: Not enough space to allocate 94371840 B L1 buffer across 110 banks, where each bank needs to store 858112 B, but bank size is 1461504 B (allocated: 987712 B, free: 473792 B, largest free block: 353472 B) backtrace: --- long> > > const&) --- tt::tt_metal::AllocatorImpl::allocate_buffer(tt::tt_metal::Buffer*) --- tt::tt_metal::Buffer::allocate_impl() --- tt::tt_metal::Buffer::create(tt::tt_metal::IDevice*, unsigned testcase.failure:
mesh_device = MeshDevice(1x4 grid, 4 devices), layer_idx = 12, seq_len = 128
@pytest.mark.parametrize("layer_idx", [SLIDING_LAYER, FULL_LAYER]) @pytest.mark.parametrize("seq_len", [128, 129, 2048]) @parametrize_mesh_with_fabric([TARGET_MESH_SHAPE]) def test_real_weight_precision_lengths_match_current_optimized( mesh_device, device_params, layer_idx, seq_len, ): """Qualify aligned, non-aligned, and bounded-long real-weight prefill."""
del device_params path = _precision_reference_path(layer_idx, seq_len) if not path.is_file(): pytest.fail( f"missing {path}; run test_capture_real_weight_current_single_chip_precision_reference " "in an isolated 1x1 process first" ) reference = torch.load(path, weights_only=True) max_cache_len = seq_len + 1 with _functional_helpers_for_layer(layer_idx): config = functional_test._config() state = functional_test._real_state() decoder = _decoder( state, config, mesh_device, layer_idx=layer_idx, max_cache_len=max_cache_len, multichip_config=_multichip_candidate_config_from_env(), optimization_config=_precision_optimization_variant(), ) physical_blocks = list(reversed(range(decoder.num_cache_blocks))) page_table = decoder.create_page_table(physical_blocks) key_cache, value_cache = decoder.create_kv_cache() generator = torch.Generator().manual_seed(61000 + layer_idx * 10000 + seq_len) hidden = torch.randn( (1, 1, seq_len, config.hidden_size), generator=generator, dtype=torch.bfloat16, ) token = torch.randn( (1, 1, 1, config.hidden_size), generator=generator, dtype=torch.bfloat16, ) attention_output = decoder._prefill_attention( _replicated(hidden, mesh_device), key_cache, value_cache, page_table, seq_len, ) _assert_pcc( reference["attention_output"], _replicated_host(attention_output), 0.99, f"real layer{layer_idx} attention residual S={seq_len}", ) prefill_routing = _prefill_routing(decoder, attention_output, seq_len) prefill_routing_host = _replicated_host(prefill_routing) _assert_pcc( reference["prefill_routing"], prefill_routing_host, 0.99, f"real layer{layer_idx} prefill routing S={seq_len}", ) _assert_top4_agreement( reference["prefill_routing"], prefill_routing_host, f"real layer{layer_idx} prefill routing S={seq_len}", ) > prefill = decoder._multichip_moe_forward(attention_output, seq_len) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
models/autoports/openai_gpt_oss_20b/tests/test_multichip_decoder.py:2333: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ models/autoports/openai_gpt_oss_20b/tt/multichip_decoder.py:1945: in _multichip_moe_forward return self._active_prefill_moe(hidden_states, normalized, routing_weights, seq_len) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ models/autoports/openai_gpt_oss_20b/tt/multichip_decoder.py:1906: in _active_prefill_moe self._ep_active_expert_chunk(normalized_chunk, routing_chunk, is_decode=False) models/autoports/openai_gpt_oss_20b/tt/multichip_decoder.py:1859: in _ep_active_expert_chunk down = ttnn.sparse_matmul( _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = FastOperation(python_fully_qualified_name='ttnn.sparse_matmul', function=<ttnn._ttnn.operations.matmul.sparse_matmul_t...uts=None, golden_function=None, postprocess_golden_function_outputs=None, is_cpp_operation=True, is_experimental=False) function_args = (device_id: 3, MeshCoordinate([0, 0]) ttnn.Tensor([[[[-3.8818e-02, 3.0518e-03, ..., -1.0986e-02, 4.6631e-02]],
..., ..., 2.5000e-01, -5.0000e-01]]]], shape=Shape([1, 8, 2880, 2880]), dtype=DataType::BFLOAT8_B, layout=Layout::TILE)) function_kwargs = {'compute_kernel_config': <ttnn._ttnn.operations.core.WormholeComputeKernelConfig object at 0x73c6f592f900>, 'dtype': DataType.BFLOAT16, 'is_input_a_sparse': True, 'is_input_b_sparse': False, ...} cq_id = None, recording = False
def __call__(self, *function_args, **function_kwargs): cq_id = None if "queue_id" in function_kwargs: cq_id = function_kwargs.pop("queue_id") elif "cq_id" in function_kwargs: cq_id = function_kwargs.pop("cq_id")
recording = ttnn.graph.is_python_io_recording_enabled() if recording: ttnn.graph.track_function_start(self.python_fully_qualified_name) ttnn.graph.record_python_operation(self.python_fully_qualified_name, function_args, function_kwargs) input_tensors = get_all_tensors((function_args, function_kwargs)) set_tensor_id(input_tensors)
try: if cq_id is None: > result = self.function(*function_args, **function_kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E RuntimeError: TT_FATAL @ /home/mvasiljevic/tt-metal/tt_metal/impl/allocator/bank_manager.cpp:462: false E info: E Out of Memory: Not enough space to allocate 94371840 B L1 buffer across 110 banks, where each bank needs to store 858112 B, but bank size is 1461504 B (allocated: 987712 B, free: 473792 B, largest free block: 353472 B) E backtrace: E --- /home/mvasiljevic/tt-metal/build_Release/lib/libtt_metal.so(+0x94c381) [0x73c74774c381] E --- tt::tt_metal::BankManager::allocate_buffer(unsigned long, unsigned long, bool, tt::tt_metal::CoreRangeSet const&, std::optional<unsigned int>, ttsl::StrongType<unsigned int, testcase.name: test_real_weight_precision_lengths_match_current_optimized[blackhole-1x4-128-13]

110 banks, where each bank needs to store 858112 B, but bank size is 1461504 B (allocated: 987712 B, free: 473792 B, largest free block: 353472 B) backtrace: --- long> > > const&) --- tt::tt_metal::AllocatorImpl::allocate_buffer(tt::tt_metal::Buffer*) --- tt::tt_metal::Buffer::allocate_impl() --- tt::tt_metal::Buffer::create(tt::tt_metal::IDevice*, unsigned testcase.failure:
mesh_device = MeshDevice(1x4 grid, 4 devices), layer_idx = 13, seq_len = 128
@pytest.mark.parametrize("layer_idx", [SLIDING_LAYER, FULL_LAYER]) @pytest.mark.parametrize("seq_len", [128, 129, 2048]) @parametrize_mesh_with_fabric([TARGET_MESH_SHAPE]) def test_real_weight_precision_lengths_match_current_optimized( mesh_device, device_params, layer_idx, seq_len, ): """Qualify aligned, non-aligned, and bounded-long real-weight prefill."""
del device_params path = _precision_reference_path(layer_idx, seq_len) if not path.is_file(): pytest.fail( f"missing {path}; run test_capture_real_weight_current_single_chip_precision_reference " "in an isolated 1x1 process first" ) reference = torch.load(path, weights_only=True) max_cache_len = seq_len + 1 with _functional_helpers_for_layer(layer_idx): config = functional_test._config() state = functional_test._real_state() decoder = _decoder( state, config, mesh_device, layer_idx=layer_idx, max_cache_len=max_cache_len, multichip_config=_multichip_candidate_config_from_env(), optimization_config=_precision_optimization_variant(), ) physical_blocks = list(reversed(range(decoder.num_cache_blocks))) page_table = decoder.create_page_table(physical_blocks) key_cache, value_cache = decoder.create_kv_cache() generator = torch.Generator().manual_seed(61000 + layer_idx * 10000 + seq_len) hidden = torch.randn( (1, 1, seq_len, config.hidden_size), generator=generator, dtype=torch.bfloat16, ) token = torch.randn( (1, 1, 1, config.hidden_size), generator=generator, dtype=torch.bfloat16, ) attention_output = decoder._prefill_attention( _replicated(hidden, mesh_device), key_cache, value_cache, page_table, seq_len, ) _assert_pcc( reference["attention_output"], _replicated_host(attention_output), 0.99, f"real layer{layer_idx} attention residual S={seq_len}", ) prefill_routing = _prefill_routing(decoder, attention_output, seq_len) prefill_routing_host = _replicated_host(prefill_routing) _assert_pcc( reference["prefill_routing"], prefill_routing_host, 0.99, f"real layer{layer_idx} prefill routing S={seq_len}", ) _assert_top4_agreement( reference["prefill_routing"], prefill_routing_host, f"real layer{layer_idx} prefill routing S={seq_len}", ) > prefill = decoder._multichip_moe_forward(attention_output, seq_len) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
models/autoports/openai_gpt_oss_20b/tests/test_multichip_decoder.py:2333: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ models/autoports/openai_gpt_oss_20b/tt/multichip_decoder.py:1945: in _multichip_moe_forward return self._active_prefill_moe(hidden_states, normalized, routing_weights, seq_len) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ models/autoports/openai_gpt_oss_20b/tt/multichip_decoder.py:1906: in _active_prefill_moe self._ep_active_expert_chunk(normalized_chunk, routing_chunk, is_decode=False) models/autoports/openai_gpt_oss_20b/tt/multichip_decoder.py:1859: in _ep_active_expert_chunk down = ttnn.sparse_matmul( _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = FastOperation(python_fully_qualified_name='ttnn.sparse_matmul', function=<ttnn._ttnn.operations.matmul.sparse_matmul_t...uts=None, golden_function=None, postprocess_golden_function_outputs=None, is_cpp_operation=True, is_experimental=False) function_args = (device_id: 3, MeshCoordinate([0, 0]) ttnn.Tensor([[[[-3.1738e-03, 2.9419e-02, ..., -6.4453e-02, -1.3306e-02]],
..., ..., 0.0000e+00, -5.0000e-01]]]], shape=Shape([1, 8, 2880, 2880]), dtype=DataType::BFLOAT8_B, layout=Layout::TILE)) function_kwargs = {'compute_kernel_config': <ttnn._ttnn.operations.core.WormholeComputeKernelConfig object at 0x73c6f9bac360>, 'dtype': DataType.BFLOAT16, 'is_input_a_sparse': True, 'is_input_b_sparse': False, ...} cq_id = None, recording = False
def __call__(self, *function_args, **function_kwargs): cq_id = None if "queue_id" in function_kwargs: cq_id = function_kwargs.pop("queue_id") elif "cq_id" in function_kwargs: cq_id = function_kwargs.pop("cq_id")
recording = ttnn.graph.is_python_io_recording_enabled() if recording: ttnn.graph.track_function_start(self.python_fully_qualified_name) ttnn.graph.record_python_operation(self.python_fully_qualified_name, function_args, function_kwargs) input_tensors = get_all_tensors((function_args, function_kwargs)) set_tensor_id(input_tensors)
try: if cq_id is None: > result = self.function(*function_args, **function_kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E RuntimeError: TT_FATAL @ /home/mvasiljevic/tt-metal/tt_metal/impl/allocator/bank_manager.cpp:462: false E info: E Out of Memory: Not enough space to allocate 94371840 B L1 buffer across 110 banks, where each bank needs to
